titleStmt.title: SII 41.11: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 11. (A.R. No. 11 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This unifinished inscription begins with the prasasti commencing with Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara etc. It records the sale deed of 4+1 ma of tax-free land (boundaries specified) given by the members of the Sabhā of Tirukkōvalūr, a brahmadēya village in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, a district of Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu alias Malāḍu to Kuravaśeri Madhāvas-sakhyāditthan, a member of the Āḷuṅganattār of Kaḍariyūṟṟu alias Kalimalla-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, in Pāṉūr-kūṟṟam. Mādhavas-sakhyāditthan gave away the land for the sacred bath, with 108 kalaśas, of god Mahādēva of Tiruvīraṭṭāṉam and for other related expenses on the occasion of Uttaramayaṉa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porceyap pāvaiyuñ cirttaṉicce
lviyun taṉ perunteviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutuyar Ūḻiyuḷiṭaituṟai nāṭun tuṭarvaṉa velip
paṭarvaṉavāsiyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭa
kkamum porukaṭarīḻat taraicar tamuṭiyumāṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal te
ṉṉavar vaitta cuntiramuṭiyu min=tiraṉāramun=teṇṭirai yīḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷa muṟai
maiyiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait to
l peruṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan=tivu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesari vaṉmarāṉa śrīrā
jentracoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 6vatu malāṭāṉa janaṉātavaḷa nāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu
brahmadeyan tirukkovalūr sabhaiyom nila vilaiyāvaṇam Innāṭṭu pāṉurk
kūṟṟattu brahmadeyaṅ kaṭaṟiyūṟṟāṉa kalimalla caturvvedimaṅkala yāḷuṅkaṇat
tāruḷ kuravaceri mādhavassacyātitthaṉukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur
paḻaverikiḻ kuṟuñcūlikkāṟcey viṟpataṟku kiḻpāṟkellai kūṉak kaṅkaikku meṟku
n teṉpāṟkallai tevatāṉaṅ kallaik kavarnilattukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai
ceppukkāṉukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ceppukkāṉukke teṟkumāka Innāṟ perellai
yilakappaṭṭa nila nāṉmāvum Itaṉ kiḻaik kūṉikkaṅkaiyilitanoṭu meṟkaṭaiya Orumāvu
māka Innilaṅkāṟ ceyyum viṟṟukkoḷavuṭaiya vilaidravyamum Iṟaidravyamumaṟakko
ṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom sabhaiyom Iṉṉilattukku muṉpu nirpāyum parice
minirum kiṇirum pāyappeṟuvatākavum Iṉṉilañ cuṭṭiveṭṭi vetiṉai Amañci kāṭṭā
tomākavum Ipparicu Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭutto mādhavasacyātitthaṉukku tirukkovalūr sa
ṉṉilaṅkālumivarkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭu Ivvūr tiruviraṭṭāṉa muṭaiya mahādevarkku Uttaramayan
kku snapaṉattukku nūṟṟeṭṭu kalacamāṭiyaruḷasnapaṉa dravyattukku poṉ Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum puṭavai
ṉ mañcāṭiyiraṇṭu māvākap puṭavai Āṟukku poṉ Ēḻumañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟi Āṭiyaruḷun teṉukkup poṉ mañcāṭi
Āṭiyaruḷu neynāṉāḻikkup poṉ mañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟiyu māṭiyaruḷum pāl nāṉāḻikku nel kuṟuṇiyum tayir ṉāḻikku nel
yaṟu nāṉāḻikkuppoṉ mūṉṟumāvum Eḷḷu ṉāḻikku poṉ mūṉṟu māvum kaṭuku nāṉāḻikku poṉIn the space between lines 24 and 25 is engraved another inscription which reads in lines a portion of the prasasti of ṟajaraja I
cuṇṇam nāṉāḻikku poṉ Iraṇṭumāvum pori nāṉāḻikkum tiru ṇanāṉāḻikkum nel kuṟuṇiyum śivakuma
mākumabhattukkumāka poṉ Āṟumāvum kalacañcūḻunūl Añpalattukku poṉ Añcumāvum paristraṇattukku
Aricikkumāka nel Oṉpatiṉāḻiyum kalacattiṉ kiḻ Aṭṭu nel kalane kuṟuṇināṉāḻiyum kalaca nūṟṟeṭṭukkum perun
ṇṭum kalamiṭak kucavanukku nelkalamum paricāramāṇiraṇṭukku nel kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum Abhiṣekañ ceyyum Ācā
kālum Amutu ceytaruḷa peruntiruvamutu Arici Irutūṇikku Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇamāka nel kalaṉey Irutūṇiyum kum
ppu nāḻikku nel nāṉāḻiyum porikkaṟiyamutukku nel munṉāḻiyum kāykkaṟi Amutukku nel kuṟuṇiyum poḻ kaṟiyamutuk
yum puḷiṅkaṟi Amutukku nel kuṟuṇiyum neyyamirtu Urikku nel kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum tayiramutu nāṉāḻikku nel kuṟu^2^
Digital edition of SII 41.11 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
